title: bixverse.plots

Must contain gene, group, pct_exp, scaled_exp. feature_labels Optional named character vector mapping gene ids display labels (default: NULL). feature_grouping Optional named character vector mapping gene ids grouping labels, e.g. cell type labels. feature_labels provided, character vectors contain mapping feature display labels respecitve groups (e.g. c(CD3E = "T cell", CD8A = "T cell", MS4A1 = "B cell", ...). (default: NULL). cluster_groups Boolean. Use hierarchical clustering grouping variable re-order group labels based expression similarity.

text: df data.table. Must contain feature_1 feature_2. features Optional length-2 character vector axis labels (default: NULL, falls back column names). geom Character. One c("density", "hex"). "density" colours point 2D KDE; "hex" bins points hexagons. smoothness Numeric. Bandwidth multiplier KDE (default: 10). used geom = "density". bins Numeric. Number hex bins (default: 60). used geom = "hex". point_size Numeric. Point size density plots (default: 2.5). point_alpha Numeric. Alpha density plots (default: 0.5). raster Boolean. Use scattermore::geom_scattermore() density variant. raster_dpi Two numerics. Pixel resolution rasterised plots.

Obs column group . feature_labels Optional named character vector mapping gene ids display labels (default: NULL). feature_grouping Optional named character vector mapping gene ids grouping labels, e.g. cell type labels. feature_labels provided, character vectors contain mapping feature display labels respecitve groups (e.g. c(CD3E = "T cell", CD8A = "T cell", MS4A1 = "B cell", ...). (default: NULL). scale_exp Boolean. Whether min-max scale mean expression per gene. modality String. One c("rna", "adt"). cluster_groups Boolean. code: embedding_plot_sc(   object,   embedding,   colour_by,   label_by = NULL,   discrete = NULL,   embd_modality = c("rna", "adt", "wnn"),   point_size = NULL,   point_alpha = 0.5,   raster = NULL,   raster_dpi = c(512, 512),   label_size = 3,   label_color = "black",   label_font = "bold" )

title: Embedding plot coloured by an obs column — embedding_plot_sc
text: object single cell class. embedding String. Name embedding (e.g. "umap"). colour_by String. Obs column colour . label_by String. Optional obs column label . (default: NULL). discrete Optional boolean. Force discrete scale coercing colour_by factor. NULL (default) picks scale column type. embd_modality String. Modality embedding pulled . One c("rna", "adt", "wnn"). Use "wnn" WNN-derived embeddings. point_size Optional numeric. Defines point size. provided, auto-determined. point_alpha Numeric. Defines alpha. raster Optional boolean. Shall plot rasterised. NULL number cells larger 1e5, defaults TRUE. raster_dpi Two numerics. Pixel resolution rasterized plots, passed geom_scattermore(). Default c(512, 512). label_size Numeric. Size labels label_color String. Color fo labels. label_font String. Font labels. bixverse::extract_embedding_data().

title: Embedding plot coloured by an obs column — embedding_plot_sc
text: ggplot object.

what: Generate enrichment map igraph (for GSEA) — enrichment_map_gsea
title: Generate enrichment map igraph (for GSEA) — enrichment_map_gsea
text: Helper function generate enrichment map based GSEA results. Similar enriched gene sets clustered together via Jaccard similarity (alternatively overlap coefficient) function returns igraph object subsequent visualisations.

title: Generate enrichment map igraph (for GSEA) — enrichment_map_gsea
code: enrichment_map_gsea(   res,   threshold,   pathways,   overlap_coefficient = FALSE,   min_sim = 0.2,   resolution = 1,   layout_func = igraph::layout_with_fr,   ... )

title: Generate enrichment map igraph (for GSEA) — enrichment_map_gsea
text: res data.table enrichment results. Needs columns c("geneset_name", "nes", "fdr"). threshold Numeric. FDR threshold wish filter . pathways Named list. original pathway list used calculation overenrichment analysis. overlap_coefficient Boolean. Shall overlap coefficient used instead Jaccard similarity. min_sim Numeric. Minimum similarity two gene sets connected. resolution Numeric. resolution parameter Louvain clustering. layout_func Layout function. Please see igraph::add_layout_() options. one used layout graph. ... parameters forward wrap_and_truncate().

title: Generate enrichment map igraph (for GSEA) — enrichment_map_gsea
text: igraph object representing enrichment map.

title: Faceted feature plot over an embedding — feature_plot_sc
code: feature_plot_sc(   object,   features,   embedding,   feature_labels = NULL,   scale = FALSE,   clip = NULL,   expr_modality = c("rna", "adt"),   embd_modality = c("rna", "adt", "wnn"),   point_size = NULL,   point_alpha = 0.5,   raster = NULL,   raster_dpi = c(512, 512),   label_by = NULL,   label_size = 3,   label_color = "black",   label_font = "bold",   highlight_features = FALSE,   highlight_quantile = 0.25,   ... )

title: Faceted feature plot over an embedding — feature_plot_sc
text: object single cell class. features Character vector. Gene/feature IDs plot, taken expr_modality. embedding String. Name embedding. feature_labels Optional named character vector mapping gene ids display labels (default: NULL). scale Boolean. Whether z-score expression values. clip Optional numeric. Clip z-scores scale = TRUE. expr_modality String. Modality expression pulled . One c("rna", "adt"). embd_modality String. Modality embedding pulled . One c("rna", "adt", "wnn"). Use "wnn" WNN-derived embeddings. point_size Optional numeric. Defines point size. provided, auto-determined. point_alpha Numeric. Defines alpha. raster Optional boolean. Shall plot rasterised. NULL number cells larger 1e5, defaults TRUE. raster_dpi Two numerics. Pixel resolution rasterized plots, passed geom_scattermore(). Default c(512, 512). label_by String. Optional obs column label . (default: NULL). label_size Numeric. Size labels label_color String. Color fo labels. label_font String. Font labels. highlight_features Boolean. Shall features strongly highlighted. Useful sparsely expressed genes. highlight_quantile Numeric [0, 1]. Defines threshold. ... Additional arguments forwarded bixverse::extract_feature_plot_data() onward get_embedding(). pass modality ; use embd_modality instead.

title: Faceted feature plot over an embedding — feature_plot_sc
text: ggplot object.

what: Scatter / hex plot of two features against each other — feature_scatter_plot_sc
title: Scatter / hex plot of two features against each other — feature_scatter_plot_sc
text: Plots two features (typical use case: protein vs mRNA ADT/RNA data). feature may carry _rna _adt suffix select modality independently; unsuffixed features fall back modality. geom = "density" points coloured 2D KDE, geom = "hex" cells binned hexagons.

title: Scatter / hex plot of two features against each other — feature_scatter_plot_sc
code: feature_scatter_plot_sc(   object,   feature_1,   feature_2,   geom = c("density", "hex"),   remove_zeros = TRUE,   smoothness = 10,   bins = 60,   modality = c("rna", "adt"),   point_size = 2.5,   point_alpha = 0.5,   raster = NULL,   raster_dpi = c(512, 512) )

title: Scatter / hex plot of two features against each other — feature_scatter_plot_sc
text: object single cell class. feature_1 String. First feature (x-axis), optionally _rna / _adt suffixed. feature_2 String. Second feature (y-axis), optionally _rna / _adt suffixed. geom String. "density" "hex" (default: "density"). remove_zeros Boolean. Drop cells features zero (default: TRUE). smoothness Numeric. Bandwidth multiplier KDE (default: 10). used geom = "density". bins Numeric. Number hex bins (default: 60). used geom = "hex". modality String. Fallback modality unsuffixed features. One c("rna", "adt"). point_size Numeric. Point size density plots (default: 2.5). point_alpha Numeric. Alpha density plots (default: 0.5). raster Optional boolean. Shall plot rasterised. NULL n_cells > 1e5, defaults TRUE. applies geom = "density". raster_dpi Two numerics. Pixel resolution rasterised plots (default: c(512, 512)).

title: Scatter / hex plot of two features against each other — feature_scatter_plot_sc
text: ggplot object.

text: width Float. Width plot. height Float. Height plot. file_type String. One c(".png", "pdf"). Plot type save. Might expanded file types. Defaults ".png" unit String. One c("", "px", "cm"). Unit type width height. Defaults "". res Integer. Resolution PNGs. create_dir Boolean. Shall plot directory generated recursively.

title: Wrapper function for standard plot parameters — params_plots
text: list parameters usage subsequent functions.

what: Wrapper function for volcano plot parameters — params_volcano
title: Wrapper function for volcano plot parameters — params_volcano
text: Wrapper function volcano plot parameters

title: Wrapper function for volcano plot parameters — params_volcano
code: params_volcano(   x_axis = "log2FC",   y_axis = "FDR",   colour = NULL,   label_column = NULL,   top_features_to_label = NULL )

title: Wrapper function for volcano plot parameters — params_volcano
text: x_axis String. Column holding effect size (e.g. "log2FC"). y_axis String. Column holding raw significance values (e.g. "FDR", "fdr", "q_value"). function applies -log10() internally. colour String NULL. Column colour points (continuous gradient). NULL, points coloured x_axis. Defaults NULL. label_column String NULL. Column holding feature labels. Required top_features_to_label set. Defaults NULL. top_features_to_label Integer NULL. Number features label, ranked y_axis ascending (significant first). Defaults NULL.

title: Wrapper function for volcano plot parameters — params_volcano
text: list parameters usage subsequent functions.

title: igraph enrichment map to ggraph plot — plot_enrichment_map_ggraph

Font size labels top enrichment map. ... parameters wish forward ggraph::geom_node_text().

title: Generate GSE dotplots — plot_gse_dotplot
text: function can take output bixverse::gse_hypergeometric() bixverse::gse_hypergeometric_list() generates former case single plot latter case list plots per target set.

title: Generate GSE dotplots — plot_gse_dotplot
code: plot_gse_dotplot(   res,   size_range = c(2, 5),   viridis_option = "D",   direction = -1,   .verbose = TRUE )

title: Generate GSE dotplots — plot_gse_dotplot
text: res data.table enrichment results. Needs columns c("hits", "target_set_lengths", "gene_set_name", "fdr"). size_range Numerical vector size 2. Defines size range dots plot. viridis_option String. option forward ggplot2::scale_fill_viridis_c(). direction 1 -1. direction colour palette. .verbose Boolean. Controls verbosity function.

title: Generate GSE dotplots — plot_gse_dotplot
text: output bixverse::gse_hypergeometric_list() provided, list dotplots per target gene set. Otherwise, single GSE OAE dot plot.

title: Plot GSEA enrichment results — plot_gsea_enrichment
text: Helper function create classical GSEA plots set pathways interest. can also provide underlying GSEA results add FDR NES information plot.

title: Plot GSEA enrichment results — plot_gsea_enrichment
code: plot_gsea_enrichment(   stats,   pathways,   pathways_of_interest,   gsea_results = NULL,   gsea_param = 1,   tick_size = 0.2,   text_size = 5 )

title: Plot GSEA enrichment results — plot_gsea_enrichment
text: stats Named numeric vector. gene level statistic. pathways List. named list element containing genes pathway. pathways_of_interest String vector. Names pathways plot. strings need represented names pathways. gsea_results Optional data.table bixverse GSEA results. provided, FDR NES given pathway interest also added plot. gsea_param Numeric. Defaults 1. tick_size Numeric. tick size. Defaults ot 0.2. text_size Numeric. text size. Defaults ot 8. relevant gsea_results provided.

what: Generate adjusted scores for plotting mitch results — prepare_mitch_scores
title: Generate adjusted scores for plotting mitch results — prepare_mitch_scores
text: Function takes results bixverse::calc_mitch(), extracts individual scores p-values contrast, runs FDR correction top p-values sets scores provided FDR threshold 0.

title: Generate adjusted scores for plotting mitch results — prepare_mitch_scores
code: prepare_mitch_scores(res, fdr_threshold = 0.05)

title: Generate adjusted scores for plotting mitch results — prepare_mitch_scores
text: res data.table. Output bixverse::calc_mitch(). fdr_threshold Numeric. FDR threshold want apply.

title: Generate adjusted scores for plotting mitch results — prepare_mitch_scores
text: list following two elements fdr_corrections - FDR-corrected scores matrix individual contrast p-values. adj_scores - extract scores per contrast scores individual FDR threshold set 0.

title: Violin plot from a data.table — violin_plot_sc.data.table

Number MADs outlier detection (default: 3). group_name Character. x-axis label (default: NULL). var_name Character. y-axis label (default: NULL). log_scale Logical. Apply log10 y-axis (default: TRUE). show_outlier Logical. Overlay outlier points (default: TRUE). raster Optional boolean. Shall plot rasterised. NULL number cells larger 1e5, defaults TRUE. ... Ignored.

title: Create a volcano plot — volcano_plot
text: Helper function generate volcano plots differental gene/transcript/protein expression analysis. function applies hood -log10(stat) transformation respective statistic want display y axis. provide labels, top features label chosen ranking -log10(stat).

title: Create a volcano plot — volcano_plot
code: volcano_plot(   dt,   volcano_plot_params = params_volcano(),   x_lab = NULL,   y_lab = NULL,   plot_title = NULL,   plot_sub_title = NULL )

title: Create a volcano plot — volcano_plot
text: dt data.table/data.frame holding differential expression results. volcano_plot_params list returned params_volcano(). x_lab Optional string. Overwrite x label plot. provided, default volcano_plot_params$x_axis. y_lab Optional string. Overwrite x label plot. provided, default -log10(volcano_plot_params$y_axis). plot_title Optional string. provided, plot get title. plot_sub_title Optional string. provided, adds sub title plot.

title: Create a volcano plot — volcano_plot
text: ggplot object.

title: bixverse.plots 0.2.1
text: Fix: ggExtra added properly dependencies.

title: bixverse.plots 0.2.0
text: Major release: Embedding helpers Dot plots Violin plots Scatter plots Helpers QC plots Improved enrichment map. Geom extension label centroids scatter plots, see label_centroids().

title: bixverse.plots 0.0.1.0
text: Helpers save plots disk easily Generation Enrichment Map like plots. Helpers generate DotPlots akin ClusterProfiler. Enrichment plots akin fgsea plots.
